articles.author: Justina Lee
articles.title: Asia markets mixed as hopes for Iran peace talks offset Trump threat of escalation - CNBC
articles.description: Korea's Kospi hits fresh intraday high, amid mixed Asian markets as investors brushed aside fresh threats from Trump on Iran ahead of a fragile ceasefire deadline.
articles.content: South Korea's Kospi hit a record high Tuesday while the broader Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed, amid hopes for a resolution to the Middle East conflict, even as tensions between Iran and the U.S. … [+2571 chars]

articles.title: Former Hawaii Gov. George Ariyoshi, first U.S. governor of Asian American descent, dies at 100 - NBC News
articles.description: Former Hawaii Gov. George R. Ariyoshi, the nation's first Asian American governor, has died at 100 years old.
articles.content:
